title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 13th April 2026 | TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: Hold; add only after Q4 results. Stabilizes ~540-550; electrographite EO duties rationalized, decent quarter likely.
recommendations.detail: HEG can be held; addition only after Q4 results. As of now stabilizes around 540-550. Product is electrographites; earlier EO duties rationalized so performance has decent/'good' possibility this quarter. Decide on fresh buying or extra adding only after results.

recommendations.note: Buy on dips; good attractive broad-market exposure; can attempt buying on a correction day like today.
recommendations.detail: Definitely buy on dips. To take exposure to the whole broader market, Nifty BeES and Bank Nifty BeES are good attractive bets; buy on the very day a correction comes, like today.

recommendations.note: Buy/accumulate in this weakness at these levels.
recommendations.detail: GMR Airports can be bought in this weakness; buy at these levels, accumulate.

recommendations.note: Accumulate; emerging among top-five infra players, definitely buy.
recommendations.detail: JSW Infra can be accumulated, because slowly it is emerging as among the top five infra players; definitely buy.

recommendations.note: Buy in weakness for 2-3 yr view; demerger to Vedanta juniors, sum-of-parts decent returns; high dividend payer.
recommendations.detail: Buy in this weakness for a 2-3 year view. Corporate restructuring/demerger to form 'Vedanta juniors'; on sum-of-the-parts basis decent-returns possibility. High dividend payer; governance concerns aside, hasn't given investors losses.

recommendations.note: Bonus not confirmed; buyback news (board meeting maybe today). Wait for reports before deciding.
recommendations.detail: In LIC the bonus isn't confirmed yet, but news came of a buyback; board meeting possibly today. Hear all the reports first, then take a decision.

recommendations.note: Contrarian buy at current levels; AI/tech negativity overblown (hiring 25,000 fresh offers), huge reserves, will adapt.
recommendations.detail: Negativity on tech is overblown; TCS issued ~25,000 fresh offer letters (44,000 hired FY26). TCS can be a contrarian bet at current levels. (Note: he also said he personally advised selling large-cap IT as great returns won't come, though they'll survive.)

recommendations.note: Contrarian buy at current levels; tech negativity overblown, large IT firms have reserves and will adapt.
recommendations.detail: Infosys can be a contrarian bet at current levels. Tech negativity overblown. (Note: he also said he personally advised selling large-cap IT for grand returns, though they'll survive.)

recommendations.note: Not a contrarian buy; buyback is actually negative, price may sustain short term then must stand on performance.
recommendations.detail: I won't say Wipro, because the buyback is actually negative; the share price may sustain in the short term, but then it has to stand only on performance.
